meta.title: HumanFlow – AI Humanizer for Korean & English
meta.description: Rewrite AI-generated text into natural, smooth, human-sounding writing. Free AI humanizer for blog posts, emails, essays and more.

hero.h1: Paste text. Get a better version.
hero.h1_v3: Your text has patterns. Fix them.
hero.desc: Reduce repetitive patterns, improve sentence flow, and get 3 rewritten versions — in seconds. No account required.

form.emptyDesc: Paste text and click Rewrite & Improve
form.errorFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

seo.h2Features: Improve Your Writing — Reduce Repetitive Patterns
seo.featuresDesc: HumanFlow restructures text to reduce predictable patterns, improve readability, and give writing a more natural flow.

features.title: Reduce repetition
features.desc: Identifies overused transitions and sentence starters that make writing feel formulaic.

features.title: Improve structure
features.desc: Restructures sentences to vary length and break up uniform patterns — without changing meaning.

features.title: 3 style options
features.desc: Natural, Clean Rewrite, and Readable — pick the style that fits your document.

steps: Paste your text into the input field on the left.
Select a rewrite style: Natural, Clean Rewrite, or Readable.
Click "Rewrite & Improve" and review 3 style variants on the right.
Copy the version you like best and use it in your document or post.

faq.a: HumanFlow rewrites text to reduce repetitive sentence patterns, improve readability, and create more natural flow — without changing the original meaning.
Yes. HumanFlow handles Korean writing specifically, improving particle use, sentence endings, and paragraph rhythm.
Yes, completely free. No account needed. Paste, click, and get results.

faq.q: Will my original meaning be changed?
faq.a: No. The rewriter preserves your original meaning and only adjusts structure, phrasing, and flow.

home.detectorDesc: Check if your text will be flagged as AI-generated. See exactly which sentences look suspicious.
home.humanizerDesc: Rewrite AI-generated text to break detection patterns. Get 3 style variants instantly.

detector.badge: Writing Pattern Check · Free · No Signup
detector.desc: Paste text to see if it has repetitive patterns, predictable structure, or flow issues — and get suggestions to improve it.
detector.placeholder: Paste your text here to analyze writing patterns...
